reportedIssues: Multiple horizontal content areas are clipped at the right edge. The top category tab row cuts off the “Hot Games” tab, and game tiles in the right column are only partially visible.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering the lower row of game tiles.

The active bottom navigation item “Casino” appears visually inconsistent with the other nav labels: it is larger, underlined, and positioned lower, making it look like a broken text link rather than a selected tab.
The top header area is crowded with multiple logos, the Pennsylvania label, hamburger menu, and Join Now button, leaving little breathing room on mobile.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention a jackpot value or any negative number display problem; all reported issues concern layout and styling of navigation/header elements.
